# Tool catalog

This catalog is generated from the canonical application contract. Run `pnpm docs:generate` after
changing that contract; CI uses `pnpm docs:check` to reject drift.

## Host inventories

- MCP (41): `validate_fen`, `validate_pgn`, `validate_line`, `get_legal_moves`, `get_position`, `evaluate_position`, `compare_moves`, `cloud_eval`, `tablebase_lookup`, `position_popularity`, `identify_opening`, `find_repertoire_gaps`, `suggest_gap_fills`, `find_theory_depth`, `get_transpositions`, `find_pruning_transpositions`, `get_repertoire_coverage`, `get_structural_profile`, `analyze_repertoire_congruence`, `classify_illustrative_lines`, `modify_repertoire_line`, `suggest_complementary_lines`, `suggest_replacement_line`, `analyze_game`, `get_game_summary`, `export_annotated_pgn`, `batch_review`, `lichess_games`, `chesscom_games`, `repertoire_vs_history`, `audit_repertoire_moves`, `find_only_moves`, `find_structures`, `check_shortcut_coverage`, `compare_shortcut_lines`, `export_annotated_repertoire`, `prep_vs_opponent`, `load_repertoire`, `load_repertoire_from_file`, `export_repertoire`, `export_repertoire_to_file`
- Browser (41): `validate_fen`, `validate_pgn`, `validate_line`, `get_legal_moves`, `get_position`, `evaluate_position`, `compare_moves`, `cloud_eval`, `tablebase_lookup`, `position_popularity`, `identify_opening`, `find_repertoire_gaps`, `suggest_gap_fills`, `find_theory_depth`, `get_transpositions`, `find_pruning_transpositions`, `get_repertoire_coverage`, `get_structural_profile`, `analyze_repertoire_congruence`, `classify_illustrative_lines`, `modify_repertoire_line`, `suggest_complementary_lines`, `suggest_replacement_line`, `analyze_game`, `get_game_summary`, `export_annotated_pgn`, `batch_review`, `lichess_games`, `chesscom_games`, `repertoire_vs_history`, `audit_repertoire_moves`, `find_only_moves`, `find_structures`, `inspect_shortcut`, `export_annotated_repertoire`, `prep_vs_opponent`, `propose_line`, `get_selected_subtree`, `get_document_pgn`, `export_strategic_fit_metadata`, `export_strategic_fit_intent_pgn`

## Contracts

| Operation | Description | Hosts | Capabilities | Result |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `validate_fen` | Validate a FEN; returns the normalised FEN when legal. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position` | `data` |
| `validate_pgn` | Validate a PGN; returns the game count. | `mcp`, `browser` | `game` | `data` |
| `validate_line` | Validate SAN moves from a FEN; returns canonical SANs or the first illegal index. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position` | `data` |
| `get_legal_moves` | Legal moves (SAN) at a FEN. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position` | `data` |
| `get_position` | Ground the current position with its normalised FEN and legal moves; the browser also includes current-document context. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position` | `data` |
| `evaluate_position` | Local Stockfish multi-line analysis with white-POV cp/mate scores. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position`, `engine` | `data` |
| `compare_moves` | Rank candidate SAN moves by local Stockfish (mover POV); illegal moves are returned separately. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position`, `engine` | `data` |
| `cloud_eval` | Lichess cloud evaluation (white-POV) for a FEN, or unavailable. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position`, `network` | `data` |
| `tablebase_lookup` | Lichess tablebase result for a seven-piece-or-fewer FEN, or unavailable. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position`, `network` | `data` |
| `position_popularity` | Lichess opening-explorer statistics for a configured game population, including move frequencies and white-POV results. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position`, `network` | `data` |
| `identify_opening` | Name the deepest ECO opening reached by a PGN. | `mcp`, `browser` | `position`, `game` | `data` |
| `find_repertoire_gaps` | Scan decision nodes for uncovered strong opponent replies, ranked by severity. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `suggest_gap_fills` | Build best-evaluation and best-fit repertoire lines for one uncovered opponent move. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `find_theory_depth` | Report where repertoire lines leave known opening theory using explorer game counts. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `network` | `data` |
| `get_transpositions` | Positions the repertoire reaches by more than one move order, largest groups first. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire` | `data` |
| `find_pruning_transpositions` | Find sound moves that transpose into another prepared line and shorten memorisation. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `get_repertoire_coverage` | Report dangling lines and natural frontiers; optionally engine-check whether stubs reconnect. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `get_structural_profile` | Return a repertoire-wide pawn-structure profile or one position selected by SAN path. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire` | `data` |
| `analyze_repertoire_congruence` | Analyze Strategic Fit across transposition-aware repertoire routes with optional population and personal-history frequency; returns native V2 evidence plus a temporary legacy projection. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `game`, `network` | `data` |
| `classify_illustrative_lines` | Find NAG-marked side lines that can inflate repertoire analysis counts. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire` | `data` |
| `modify_repertoire_line` | Apply or preview a prune, add, or reorder edit by SAN path. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `action` | `action` |
| `suggest_complementary_lines` | Suggest engine-sound moves ranked for structural fit or imbalance. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `suggest_replacement_line` | Suggest sound replacements for an incongruent repertoire line. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `analyze_game` | Per-move engine review of a game's mainline with centipawn loss and classification. | `mcp`, `browser` | `game`, `engine` | `data` |
| `get_game_summary` | Game-review summary with per-side counts, accuracy, and worst moves. | `mcp`, `browser` | `game`, `engine` | `data` |
| `export_annotated_pgn` | Annotate a game's mainline with move glyphs and best-move/evaluation comments. | `mcp`, `browser` | `game`, `engine`, `artifact` | `artifact` |
| `batch_review` | Analyze multiple games and aggregate results by opening or player color. | `mcp`, `browser` | `game`, `engine` | `data` |
| `lichess_games` | Fetch recent games for a Lichess user. | `mcp`, `browser` | `game`, `network` | `data` |
| `chesscom_games` | Fetch games for a Chess.com user in a given month. | `mcp`, `browser` | `game`, `network` | `data` |
| `repertoire_vs_history` | Compare a repertoire with a user's games and report all departures. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `game`, `network` | `data` |
| `audit_repertoire_moves` | Engine-check prescribed moves tree-wide and rank findings by centipawn loss. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `find_only_moves` | Find positions where the best move clearly exceeds the second choice. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine`, `artifact` | `artifact` |
| `find_structures` | Search repertoire leaves by structure, center, themes, or color complex. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire` | `data` |
| `check_shortcut_coverage` | Check whether pruning a shortcut line creates an uncovered gap. | `mcp` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `compare_shortcut_lines` | Compare shortcut candidates by engine quality and structural fit. | `mcp` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `inspect_shortcut` | Inspect one shortcut candidate for both line quality and coverage safety. | `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine` | `data` |
| `export_annotated_repertoire` | Run analyses and produce a cloned, annotated repertoire PGN. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `engine`, `artifact` | `artifact` |
| `prep_vs_opponent` | Compare a repertoire with an opponent's games and summarize preparation targets. | `mcp`, `browser` | `repertoire`, `game`, `network` | `data` |
| `load_repertoire` | Parse a repertoire PGN and return a Node-host handle. | `mcp` | `repertoire` | `data` |
| `load_repertoire_from_file` | Load a repertoire PGN from the confined Node repertoire directory. | `mcp` | `repertoire` | `data` |
| `export_repertoire` | Serialize a Node repertoire handle to PGN. | `mcp` | `repertoire`, `artifact` | `artifact` |
| `export_repertoire_to_file` | Write repertoire PGN under the confined Node repertoire directory. | `mcp` | `repertoire`, `artifact` | `artifact` |
| `propose_line` | Stage a validated SAN line for explicit user acceptance without mutating the repertoire. | `browser` | `repertoire`, `action` | `action` |
| `get_selected_subtree` | Retrieve bounded SAN lines for the currently selected repertoire subtree. | `browser` | `repertoire` | `data` |
| `get_document_pgn` | Retrieve the full current PGN only when an operation genuinely needs the artifact. | `browser` | `game`, `repertoire`, `artifact` | `artifact` |
| `export_strategic_fit_metadata` | Export the current document's normalized Strategic Fit metadata as a versioned, secret-free JSON sidecar. | `browser` | `repertoire`, `artifact` | `artifact` |
| `export_strategic_fit_intent_pgn` | Export a cloned legal PGN with bounded portable comments for confirmed Strategic Fit intent, resolutions, and findings. | `browser` | `repertoire`, `artifact` | `artifact` |
